name: card
description: A surface container with the full shadcn slot set: title / description / action compose the header, content is the body, footer the optional bottom region (each a Content slot, the server-first equivalent of CardTitle/CardDescription/CardAction/CardContent/CardFooter). A title makes it a labelled region (role=region + aria-labelledby). Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the card partial to your JTE root at lievit/card.jte, reached as @template.lievit.card(content=@`...`). Compose the header from title + description + action slots (or the plain-text heading + headingId for back-compat) and add a footer slot; a title renders a labelled region. The source is yours: edit freely.
